name: Cajun Oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together except for the shortening.
2. Place the mixture in a plastic bag and shake to ensure thorough mixing.
3. Add the oysters to the mixture and shake until they are fully coated.
4. Heat the shortening in a pan over medium heat.
5. Brown each side of the oysters in the hot shortening.
6. Remove the oysters from the pan and place them on paper towels to drain excess grease.
7. Allow the oysters to cool before serving.
